ddls:
CREATE TABLE "snps" (
  "snp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SNP */,
  "chromosome" INTEGER /* Chromosome number */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position on the chromosome */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the SNP */,
  "maf" REAL /* Minor allele frequency of the SNP */,
  "nobs" INTEGER /* Number of observations */,
  "rsquare_without_snp" REAL /* R-squared value of the model without the SNP */,
  "rsquare_with_snp" REAL /* R-squared value of the model with the SNP */,
  "effect" REAL /* Effect size of the SNP */,
  "allele1" TEXT /* First allele of the SNP */,
  "allele2" TEXT /* Second allele of the SNP */,
  "frequency_allele1" REAL /* Frequency of the first allele */,
  "frequency_allele2" REAL /* Frequency of the second allele */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the SNP belongs to */,
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trait the SNP is associated with */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the SNP is associated with */,
  "literature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literature the SNP is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the SNP was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the SNP was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_snps" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "snp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SNP */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the SNP in the study */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Effect size of the SNP in the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "snp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the sample belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the sample */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the sample */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the sample */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sample was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_snps" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  "snp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SNP */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the SNP in the sample */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id", "snp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_models" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistical model */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the model in the study */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Effect size of the model in the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the database */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the trait */,
  "trait_description" TEXT /* Description of the trait */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the trait */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trait was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trait was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snp_traits" (
  "snp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SNP */,
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trait */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snp_id", "trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "disease_description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the disease */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disease was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the disease was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snp_diseases" (
  "snp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SNP */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snp_id", "disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "literature" (
  "literature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each literature */,
  "literature_name" TEXT /* Name of the literature */,
  "literature_description" TEXT /* Description of the literature */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the literature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the literature was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the literature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("literature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snp_literature" (
  "snp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the SNP */,
  "literature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the literature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snp_id", "literature_id")
)
